lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Port Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: You've been here how long? You should know what we do by now.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: Port Piscarilius is home to Kourend's fishermen and traders. We are the first port of call for any visitors to Kourend which means Port Piscarilius is home to a wide variety of individuals.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: All people and goods coming to or from Kourend go through Port Piscarilius. This unfortunatly means that we are a centre point for the majority of crime within the city.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: For many years I appealed to the Kourend Council for help in fighting this crime, but they cared little for us. Instead, I decided to beat them at their own game and fight fire with fire.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: What else do you want?

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Saviours of Kourend.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: For many years I used my position to fight against the crime and corruption in this city. No matter what I did it was never enough though. I realised that to defeat my enemies I needed to act as they do.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: That's why I formed the Saviours of Kourend. We take the laws into our own hands and fight against all who would damage this city, no matter who they are.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: What else do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Port Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: You've been here how long? You should know what we do by now.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: Port Piscarilius is home to Kourend's fishermen and traders. We are the first port of call for any visitors to Kourend which means Port Piscarilius is home to a wide variety of individuals.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: All people and goods coming to or from Kourend go through Port Piscarilius. This unfortunatly means that we are a centre point for the majority of crime within the city.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: For many years I appealed to the Kourend Council for help in fighting this crime, but they cared little for us. Instead, I decided to beat them at their own game and fight fire with fire.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: What else do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your plans.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: What else do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: How about you go away then?

sections.title: If the player lost the memoir page before using it on the memoir

lines.speaker: Lady Shauna Piscarilius
lines.text: Looking for your reward, idiot? Take it and get lost.
